clinic.name: Al-Shifa Family Clinic
clinic.address: Olaya Street, Al-Olaya District, Riyadh, Saudi Arabia

timings.notes: Weekly closure: Friday mornings only (for Jummah prayer). Last appointment 30 minutes before closing. Two shifts daily with a midday break.

doctors.name: Dr. Khalid Al-Otaibi
doctors.qualifications: MBBS, SBFM (Saudi Board of Family Medicine)

doctors.name: Dr. Sara Al-Subaie
doctors.qualifications: MBBS, MD (Pediatrics), Member of Saudi Pediatric Society

doctors.name: Dr. Hassan Al-Qahtani
doctors.qualifications: BDS, SBOD (Saudi Board of Operative Dentistry)

appointment_policy.walk_in_note: Walk-ins are welcome but booked appointments take priority. Wait time may exceed 1 hour during peak evening hours.

faqs.a: Yes, we accept most major Saudi health insurance plans including Bupa Arabia, Tawuniya, MedGulf, Al Etihad, and Al Rajhi Takaful. Please bring your insurance card and Iqama on visit.

faqs.q: How do I cancel or reschedule?
faqs.a: Send us a WhatsApp message at least 4 hours before your appointment. There is no cancellation fee with proper notice.
Yes, we offer home consultations and sample collection for an additional SAR 100 within Riyadh city limits.

faqs.q: Can I get a prescription refill without a visit?
faqs.a: For ongoing prescriptions, our doctors can issue refills via WhatsApp after a brief consultation. Charge: SAR 50.
Yes, free covered parking is available on-site for up to 20 vehicles.
Absolutely. We welcome all residents and visitors. Please bring your Iqama or passport for registration.

emergency_guidance: For severe symptoms (chest pain, difficulty breathing, heavy bleeding, loss of consciousness, suspected stroke or heart attack), do NOT wait. Call 911 (Saudi unified emergency) or 997 (Red Crescent ambulance) immediately, or go to the nearest emergency room. We will notify our on-call doctor to follow up.
